channel.title: Oval Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.8.0
item.description:
What is New in v1.8.0

  • Added
  • Temporary/ephemeral chat mode — Start chats that are not saved to history, with option to save mid-conversation
  • Conversation tags — Tag-based filtering in the sidebar with search support
  • CI build workflow — GitHub Actions workflow that builds and tests the project on every pull request
  • Automated release workflow — GitHub Actions workflow triggered on tag push that builds, signs, notarizes, and publishes a GitHub Release
  • Removed
  • RunAnywhereAI SDK dependency — Removed to simplify the build and reduce binary size

item.title: Version 1.7.1
item.description:
What is New in v1.7.1

  • Fixed
  • Hotkeys stop working after window close — Global hotkeys (Quick Chat, Toggle Window, Paste to Chat) now persist when the main window is closed ([#41](https://github.com/shreyaspapi/Oval/issues/41))
  • Menu bar icon disappears after window close — Tray icon and menu now survive the main window being closed
  • Toggle Window hotkey with no window — Pressing the Toggle Window hotkey after closing the window now re-activates the app and recreates the window

item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
What is New in v1.7.0

  • Added
  • Full localization — All UI strings localized across 10 languages — English, German, French, Italian, Spanish, Dutch, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, and Korean
  • In-app language picker — New Language section in Settings lets you switch the app language without changing macOS system language (requires restart to apply)
  • Localized strings files — Complete `.lproj/Localizable.strings` for all 10 languages covering menus, toolbar, connect/login screen, sidebar, chat input, voice mode, live transcription, message bubbles, settings, and about views

item.title: Version 1.6.3
item.description:
What is New in v1.6.3

  • Added
  • Support section in Settings — Buy Me a Coffee, GitHub Sponsors, and Star on GitHub buttons in Settings > General
  • Sponsors section in README — Badge links and placeholder for listing GitHub sponsors
  • Blank issue template — Users can now file custom issues without a template

item.title: Version 1.6.2
item.description:
What is New in v1.6.2

  • Added
  • Automated release script — `scripts/release.sh` handles the full release workflow locally (build, sign, notarize, DMG, appcast, GitHub release)

item.title: Version 1.6.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.6.1

  • Fix Sparkle auto-update — Added sandbox entitlements required by Sparkle 2 so auto-updates work correctly.
  • Xcode 26 build compatibility — Added RAG linker stubs for Xcode 26.

item.title: Version 1.6.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.6.0

  • Customizable hotkeys — Global keyboard shortcuts (Quick Chat, Toggle Window, Paste to Chat) can now be changed in Settings > General > Keyboard Shortcuts.
  • Shortcut recorder — Click any shortcut field to record a new key combination interactively; press Esc to cancel.
  • Per-shortcut reset — Each shortcut has a reset button to restore its factory default.
  • Persistent preferences — Custom hotkeys are saved to config.json and restored on launch.
  • Dynamic tray labels — Menu bar shortcut hints update to reflect configured bindings.
  • Bug fix — Removed hardcoded keyboard shortcut that caused Ctrl+Space to trigger even after reassignment.

item.title: Version 1.5.1
item.description:
What's New in v1.5.1

  • Fix thinking content rendering — Reasoning/thinking blocks now correctly decode HTML entities and strip extraneous blockquote markers, fixing garbled display of model reasoning output.

item.title: Version 1.5.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.5.0

  • Tool calls & streaming fixes — Full Socket.IO event handling (18+ event types) matching Conduit feature parity. Tool confirmation/input dialogs, code execution results, follow-up chips.
  • Clickable citations — Citation references [1], [2] are now clickable with source URL links and domain labels.
  • Status indicators — Real-time status updates during tool execution (searching, generating, etc.) with proper SwiftUI diffing.
  • Content duplication fix — Fixed bug where flat chat:completion content was appended instead of replaced, causing doubled text.
  • Sources panel — Collapsible sources/citations view below messages.
  • Stream resilience — 90-second watchdog timer, reconnection recovery, chat completed API call.
  • Developer ID signed — App is now properly signed with Developer ID and notarized for seamless updates.

item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.4.0

  • Fix login persistence — Login now persists across app restarts. Tokens stored securely in macOS Keychain.
  • Per-conversation streaming — Multiple chats can stream responses independently. Switching chats no longer interrupts active streams.
  • Sidebar streaming indicators — Spinner shows next to chats that are actively generating responses.
  • Sidebar auto-sorting — Conversations move to the top when you send a message.
  • Rich model selector — Search, filter, pin favorite models, model avatars with async loading and caching.
  • Voice model persistence — Downloaded voice models no longer flash the download button on restart.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.3.0

  • Realtime transcription — Live captions with sliding window STT (WhisperKit Neural Engine or ONNX). Press Cmd+Shift+T or click the captions button.
  • Speaker diarization — Identify who's speaking with FluidAudio (Pyannote + WeSpeaker). Toggle "Speakers" in the transcription panel.
  • Adaptive voice detection — VAD now auto-calibrates to ambient noise, works for all voice types.
  • Fixed model downloads — Resolved -422 errors, downloads now show progress in MB with a progress bar.
  • WhisperKit CoreML support — WhisperKit models now load correctly on Apple Neural Engine.
  • Updated model catalog — Added Moonshine Base EN and Kokoro EN voice, removed broken URLs.
  • Socket.IO chat streaming — Dual-path streaming (Socket.IO + SSE) for faster responses.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.2.0

  • Sparkle auto-update — Oval now checks for updates automatically and installs them in-app
  • All voice mode improvements from v1.1.0 included

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
What's New in v1.1.0

  • Voice mode floating window — ChatGPT-style compact window instead of fullscreen
  • On-device STT/TTS model selection — choose from multiple Whisper and Piper models in Settings
  • Better TTS for chat — play button uses on-device Piper voice instead of macOS system voice
  • Instant TTS stop — stops mid-sentence when you hit stop
  • Auto-update support — Sparkle integration for seamless updates
